Package com.saperion.intf

Interface SaUserInfo

All Superinterfaces:
MutableUserInformation, Serializable
All Known Subinterfaces:
WorkflowMember
All Known Implementing Classes:
SaUserInfoImpl, WorkflowMemberImpl
public interface SaUserInfo extends MutableUserInformation
This class holds detailed information about a Saperion user management entity e.g. users.
Author:
rbo

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    static enum 
    SaUserInfo.GroupKind
    This enumeration holds the different kinds of entities in a saperion user management entity.
